# GR8 GAMZ

GR8 GAMZ is a mobile-first browser games hub for free HTML5 arcade games, quick-play games, daily challenges, selection labs and repeat-play loops.

Primary site: https://www.gr8gamz.com

Important routes:
- /games - full game catalogue
- /mobile-games - mobile-first browser games collection
- /quick-games - short-session quick games collection
- /free-browser-games - free no-download browser games collection
- /popular - popular games
- /new - new games
- /controls/tap - tap games
- /controls/swipe - swipe games
- /controls/drag - drag games
- /difficulty/easy - easy games
- /difficulty/medium - medium games

Game pages use /arcade/{game-slug} and include visible instructions, controls, summary content, FAQs and related-game links.


Authority and content routes:
- /updates - GR8 GAMZ updates, game guides and developer notes
- /updates/gr8-gamz-launch-announcement - launch announcement
- /updates/first-15-games-guide - launch game guide
- /updates/mobile-first-browser-game-design-notes - mobile-first design notes
- /updates/gr8-focus-mode-explained - fullscreen play feature notes
- /updates/seo-and-ai-visibility-foundation - SEO and AI visibility notes
- /collections - curated game collections
- /collections/best-mobile-browser-games - mobile browser game collection
- /collections/best-quick-games - quick game collection
- /collections/best-arcade-games - arcade game collection
- /collections/games-with-selection-labs - games with loadouts and selection systems
- /new-this-week - fresh weekly-style hub for new games and updates

Update pages include visible summaries, article sections, FAQs, related game links and Article schema.
Collection pages include real playable game lists, summary content and CollectionPage schema.


Growth automation and feeds:
- /latest - latest changed pages and fresh crawl map
- /feeds - RSS, JSON Feed, grouped sitemaps and IndexNow endpoint list
- /seo-status - operational search/indexing checklist
- /rss.xml - RSS feed for update posts
- /feed.json - JSON Feed for update posts
- /sitemap-index.xml - grouped sitemap index
- /sitemap-games.xml - playable game sitemap
- /sitemap-content.xml - updates and collections sitemap
- /sitemap-discovery.xml - core, category, tag and discovery route sitemap
- /indexnow-urls.json - machine-readable IndexNow URL list


V19 implementation:
- /updates/v19-gameplay-qa-premium-polish-implementation - gameplay QA and premium polish update
- Second-drop games now include stronger shared engine behaviour, score result posting, pause/resume support and improved controls.


V20 third game drop:
- /updates/v20-third-premium-game-drop - announcement for the 10-game V20 premium drop
- /collections/v20-third-game-drop - curated V20 game collection
- /arcade/neon-pinball-rush
- /arcade/cyber-bowling-blitz
- /arcade/lava-tile-escape
- /arcade/galaxy-golf-putt
- /arcade/monster-truck-tap
- /arcade/fruit-slice-fever
- /arcade/shadow-ninja-leap
- /arcade/cannon-coin-blast
- /arcade/ice-slide-puzzle
- /arcade/astro-memory-grid


V21 GamePix monetisation foundation:
- /gamepix-games - GamePix partner games feed page
- /gamepix-games/play - noindex partner game embed route
- /gaming-deals - future affiliate buyer guide hub
- /partner-disclosure - partner and affiliate disclosure
- /updates/v21-gamepix-feed-integration - V21 update announcement


V22 GameMonetize network integration:
- /gamemonetize-games - GameMonetize partner games feed page
- /gamemonetize-games/play - noindex GameMonetize partner game embed route
- /api/gamemonetize/feed - server-side proxy for the GameMonetize JSON/RSS feed
- /updates/v22-gamemonetize-network-integration - V22 update announcement
